---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for mergecalib
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What problem would this solve?**
A clear description of the statistical or workflow problem.

**Proposed solution**
What you would like the package to do. Note any impact on the package's core
guarantees (determinism, positive final sample size, no cross-province
borrowing, no fabricated sample).

**Alternatives considered**
Any alternative approaches or workarounds you have tried.

**Additional context**
Anything else that would help, e.g. references or example data shapes.
